name: Mr. McMahon
description: Uses an alias. Provides legal or illegal jobs involving people with power and/or money. Treats all interactions as strictly business.

name: Fixer
description: Need a passport? A way in? Weapons? Supplies? Your fixer has got you covered — for a price.

name: Law Enforcer
description: Works within a city or corporate police force. Can give you the scoop or get you out of trouble.

name: Street Doc
description: In hospitals, gunshots are always reported to security. A street doc keeps things quiet. Can also install cyberware.

name: Hacker
description: Can forge your way into high-security areas through a few clicks of a keyboard.

name: Vlogger
description: Gives you the scoop on all things entertainment and fashion.
